payload.answer: Article ingestion aborted due to 404 error and URL formatting issues. No durable memory created.

entity_resolution.reason: URL format ambiguity prevents automated processing; requires manual validation before retry.

memory_cards.statement: Failed to fetch article at URL 'https -//examplecom/missing' due to 404 network error (punctuation/format ambiguity in URL).

details: URL parsing failed: 'https -//examplecom/missing' (missing '://' and domain ambiguity).
HTTP 404 error received during fetch attempt.
No content extracted; no memory cards generated.

repair_options: Correct URL punctuation (e.g., 'https://example.com/missing') and retry fetch.
Verify article existence via alternative sources.
Mark as 'unreliable source' if intentional ambiguity exists.
